title: The Straw Hat Promise
description: On pages 51–53, this part follows the Romance Dawn flashback and focuses on how Luffy’s pirate dream is formed through Shanks, Higuma, and the straw hat promise.
scene: Shanks leaves Luffy with the straw hat, turning their farewell into a promise about the future.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ...begins 10 years later from this very same spot.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: WELL, HE'S FINALLY SETTING OUT, EH, MAYOR?

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: BUT IF HE DOES BECOME A PIRATE, HE'LL BRING SHAME TO THE VILLAGE.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I NEVER THOUGHT HE'D REALLY DO IT!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's a good day to set out to sea!

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: SORRY I HAVE TO DO THIS...

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: BUT HERE'S AN ATTACK I'VE BEEN PERFECTING SINCE THE LAST TIME WE MET!!

summary: Shanks entrusts Luffy with the straw hat as a promise for the future. This moment turns Luffy’s dream into the core vow that will define his journey.
